projectCard.shortDescription: A premier gated housing scheme on Main Shikarpur Road offering residential and commercial plots with modern infrastructure, parks, and 24/7 security.

detailsPage.fullDescription:
Dream City Housing Scheme Sukkur is a state-of-the-art residential and commercial project developed by Dolphin Builders & Developers. Strategically located on Main Shikarpur Road near Dua Hotel & Restaurant, this project is designed to redefine urban living in Sukkur. As a Government of Sindh approved development, it offers a secure and legally sound investment environment.

The project features a fully gated community with a magnificent main gate, wide road networks, and modern underground infrastructure. Residents will enjoy a complete lifestyle ecosystem including a central masjid, family parks, walking tracks, and essential facilities like schools, hospitals, and a dedicated shopping mall. With sustainable features like solar street lights and robust 24/7 CCTV surveillance, Dream City Sukkur provides a safe, green, and sophisticated atmosphere for families to thrive.
detailsPage.introduction: A Modern Lifestyle Housing Scheme Approved by Government of Sindh
features: Boundary wall gated project with professional security guards
Magnificent main gate development and entrance
Wide road infrastructure with solar street lights
Central Masjid and family parks with walking tracks
Indoor Cricket Ground for sports enthusiasts
Modern water supply system and 24/7 CCTV surveillance
investmentBenefits: Official approval by Government of Sindh for maximum security
Flexible booking available on easy installments
Strategic highway road connectivity for rapid accessibility
Premium positioning as Sukkur's modern lifestyle housing destination
